title: FundedElite Premiere: Your Epic Trading Breakthrough Unveiled!
description: The curtain rises on an unprecedented opportunity! FundedElite unleashes up to 25% OFF, a 95% Profit Split, and a game-changing 12% drawdown for traders ready to star in their own success story.
seo_content:
FundedElite Up to 25% OFF Deal

FundedElite is offering an automatic, no-code-required discount of up to 25% OFF on all trading challenges. This promotion is applied automatically at checkout — simply visit FundedElite via the affiliate link, select your challenge, and the discount will be reflected in your order total without needing to enter any coupon code. Combined with a standout 95% profit split and a generous 12% drawdown allowance, this is one of the strongest all-round funded trading offers currently available.

FundedElite is a proprietary trading firm with deep roots in the European prop trading scene. The firm has developed a strong reputation for operational reliability, trader-friendly conditions, and a Free Retry Program that provides a safety net for traders who fail their initial evaluation. Their Italian institutional background gives the firm a culture of precision and quality that is reflected in their challenge design and payout practices.

With the automatic discount applying up to 25% at checkout, there is no complexity in claiming this deal — the savings are built directly into the current pricing. Beyond the discount, FundedElite's 95% profit split is among the most competitive in the industry, meaning funded traders retain the vast majority of their earnings. The 12% drawdown allowance is also notably generous, giving traders meaningful room to withstand normal market volatility without triggering a failed evaluation.

FundedElite's trading conditions are delivered through the TradeLocker platform and include a clearly defined challenge structure with profit targets and drawdown limits. The Free Retry Program applies to eligible accounts where traders meet minimum trading activity requirements before failing, making it a genuine safety net rather than a marketing claim. Payouts are processed through verified channels with a consistent track record.

To activate this offer, click the affiliate link above to FundedElite and select your challenge account. The discount — which can be up to 25% depending on the tier — will appear automatically in your cart. No coupon code is needed. Review the Free Retry Program terms and the 95% profit split structure on the FundedElite site before purchasing to ensure the account size and rules align with your trading plan.
